title: Danix's Decoration
description: A simple Decoration Mod that add some decorative blocks to vanilla minecraft
body:
# **1. What is Danix's Decoration?**
### **Danix's Decoration** is a simple mod that adds more blocks to vanilla building
For now this mod is **_EXTREMELY_** a beta version, I hope to add much more blocks and maybe some furniture so stay tuned for the future
![ADDED BLOCKS! 1.0.5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73eecd40f9a733e4207979ccf716efffca72a722.jpeg)

# 2. Can I use it in a modpack?
YES
